title: Gendoticular Annollatio and the NTR vibe
display_title: Gendoticular Annollatio and the NTR vibe
wikitext:
[]: "Gendoticular Annollatio" and the NTR vibe             Quote Post by Ispellnogood » Thu Apr 10, 2014 1:18 pm Found this discussion, and it's starting to make an awful lot o sense to me. Tomino, you mean the "Kill-them-all" - Tomino? The guy who did Ideon? I am not masochistic. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/01(Tue)1031 No.22510 >22483 Lucas is mediocre as a movies director; Anno is one of the best as an anime director. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/02(Wed)0505 No.22511 I think OP wants to know how increase the otaku suffering by adding Tomino to the staff. That is, unless he wants to delve in anguish and surprise himself by things turning out better he feared to be. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/02(Wed)1735 No.22517 >>Tomino, you mean the "Kill-them-all" - Tomino? The guy who did Ideon?I am not masochistic. Any Eva fan who thinks Rebuild and Anno are good, is definitely a masochist. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/02(Wed)1828 No.22521 I think the only thing Anno can bring to 4.0 and Evangelion as a whole is more Shinji ball bashing and Gendo ball sucking. The "Story" will always be mashed, hammered and cut, to fit his "genius" talent. There will probably be something in there, responding to 3.0's reactions too. I don't think 4.0 can be salvaged, no matter who directs it'll be crap, 3.0 guarantees it. I wouldn't want to see it in a theater or even waste the computer space needed to download it. But if I was forced to watch it at the movies, I know one of the things i'd bring would be a masquerade mask, so know one finds out i'm an Eva fan (or most likely "was" by that time). It's easy to get blinded by rebuild when you're a Manga/Anime eva fan, but the writing actually is pretty shit. >> Name Darkwing 14/04/04(Fri)1133 No.22544 Two things to keep in mind. 1- Tomino has gotten over a lot of his issues. Look at everything he's done from Turn-A on. It tends to be a lot more optimistic, and a lot less kill-em-all. 2- At least back when Eva first came out, Tomino didn't like it at all. There is a newtype interview on Evageeks with him, and he basicly said he saw Eva's message as it's okay to be depressed and commit suicide. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/04(Fri)1802 No.22545 Name one noteworthy series Tomino made since Zeta. I dare you. Also people need to stop being Shinji about "depressing" anime. It's called pathos. Don't take it so seriously. The most depressing show I've watched was Highschool DxD because it's an uncreative, derivative mess that typifies the current wreck of the animation industry. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/05(Sat)0238 No.22550 Do you think anime became popular because of the gripping Storylines they have? Posting anything on a site like this kind off excludes you from the imaginary anime film festival alumni. Sex and Violence has always been animes appeal. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/05(Sat)0404 No.22552 >>It's easy to get blinded by rebuild when you're a Manga/Anime eva fan, but the writing actually is pretty shit. The Directing is too. Anno leaving eva would be for the best. But at this point it would be like putting a band-aid on a bullet wound. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/05(Sat)0457 No.22553 Please don't assume anyone whose personal taste classifies Rebuild differently than you is just "blinded". >> Name Anonymous 14/04/05(Sat)0733 No.22561 So, will we get at least a bittersweet ending? >> Name Anonymous 14/04/05(Sat)2243 No.22657 >22550 Yeah, Heidi, the Von Trapp Family, Marco, Nils Holgersson, Conan the Future Boy, the Swiss Family Robinson, all known for their abundant sex and gratuitous violence... >Sex and Violence (among other things) has always been Gainax appeal. Fixed. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/06(Sun)0116 No.22660 Heidi, the Von Trapp Family, Marco, Nils Holgersson, Conan the Future Boy, the Swiss Family Robinson, are known? >> Name Anonymous 14/04/06(Sun)0914 No.22671 >22660 Yes. They were broadcasted in many countries. A lot of people has fond memories of those shows, those who ended up being anime fans and those who didn't see any anime since they were kids. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/06(Sun)2024 No.22686 >>So, will we get at least a bittersweet ending? No, It'll be something trolly, convoluted, pro-Gendo and leave fans wanting someone to do it again. So pretty much same thing as the rest of Anno's Evangelion works. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/07(Mon)1156 No.22720 >>Also people need to stop being Shinji about "depressing" anime. It's called pathos. Pathos? The Anime maybe, but EoE through to Rebuild reeks of the netorare vibe. It only loses the NTR stink, when you switch Shinji and Gendo's roles, then it becomes indulgent, geriatric-emo trite. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/07(Mon)1228 No.22721 >netorare Only if you're Rei and it involves your boyfriend getting stolen and turned into Kaworu's girlfriend >> Name Anonymous 14/04/07(Mon)1619 No.22722 Not saying it is Netorare porn, it has the same vibe, overtones, leaves the same bad taste. It reminds me of a Japanese movie on youtube called "Aoi Sora" or something. It's about a fat guy who's obsessed/stalking a girl. The girl has shithead, cheating boyfriend, the fat guy ends up gropping her on a train. Filled with self loathing he tries to kill himself, the attempt fails and he winds up in hospital next to the girl he groped. They end up talking to each other with a curtain seperating their beds. Thing seem to be going well until the girl tries to pull back the curtain to see him, and he hides under a blanket. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/07(Mon)1619 No.22723 That night the cheating boyfriend visits her, and she ends up sucking his cock, the fat guy burst into tears, and ends up jerking off to the slurpy sounds. I saw this movie and immediately thought of EoE. I'm not an expert on Japanese fetish names, so I don't know if netorare the most accurate title for this shit, all I know is that it belongs in the same masocistic group as netorare. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0217 No.22753 It's pretty easy to see anno's MO for Eva and what to expect from 4.0, when you do a quick summary of Eva with the bullshit cut out, the anime, EoE to the Rebuild direction. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0220 No.22754 The anime, has Gendo staring intrumentality. Misato say something to Ritsuko about "who made you humanities overseer", Ritsuko says " That's exactly what you wished for", It's pretty much the same for Shinji/Asuka/Rei/Misato. There's words reading "Thank you to my father" from Shinji. The end. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0222 No.22755 EoE , has Gendo talking to Seele saying " death creates nothing, and that Humanity must go forth and reshape this new world" and then once Seele attacks "our defeat is inevitable" like he has no choice, and that seeles forcing him to start instumentality. He then tells Rei to 'join all souls into one" She refuses and goes to Shinji, Gendo begs for her to come back. When Shinji destroys the world, Gendo tells Yui he's "waited so long for this day", and being bitten in half is his pennace just for closing his heart. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0224 No.22756 EoE Gendo is inconsistant, incomprehensible flipflop of a character because Anno's a Gendo fanboy and any redo done by him is to make him look better. Meanwhile you can almost hear Anno's NTR-whip craking on Shinji "Send me death threats will you" woohtish 'hospital masturbation, "crap director am I" woopah 'be useless and whiny, "want to punch my Gendo, do you" wootish 'everybody just die'. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0225 No.22757 Rebuild, has the Seele/Gendo conspiricy/secret agenda dumbed down, with Misato knowing about the giant and the dummy plug, Kaji's character useless now. It's the war for survival against the angels and Shinji's reluctance and poorly written tantrums are selfish and childish. Gendo's role seems to be a cold and unfeeling commander who makes tough desicions because humanity survival is important, and that Shinji should "grow up". Shinji starting near third impact in an even more shoddy way than in EoE. Gendo goes "just as planned" or "it begins" or some shit . >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0230 No.22758 3.0 was pretty much just Anno using his NTR whip on Shinji through most of the movie, and then fuyutsuki trying to sell gendo with some 4th grade tragedy B.S "sold his soul to darkness" or something. Misato is a cheap gendo knockoff, probably invented so you route for Gendo. The 14year skip has trollish meaning, it's about the same amount time that fans have been waiting for someone to do something good with eva, INstead of living apparently. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0237 No.22759 A mere co-writer can't stop Anno from turning rebuild into another NTR flavoured crappachino. There's only one man who can.... >> Name Captain Hindsight 14/04/09(Wed)0254 No.22760 >>Whooosh! "They should of put some effort into taking Eva out of Anno's hands. He's always saying 'Let it go' so surely he'll take his own advice. Then they should of given it to a director who isn't an Anno buttkisser, someone who doesn't even respect evangelion as a story. Then you might have finally gotten a redo that doesn't leave you all wanting a REDO." WHooosh! >> Name Anonymous 14/04/09(Wed)0259 No.22761 Thank you Captain Hindsight! GOD BLESS YOU! >> Name Anonymous 14/04/10(Thu)0313 No.22774 And this is why we should unleash depressed Tomino on Eva 4.0 scripts. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/10(Thu)0546 No.22776 with just one movie remaining, I can't really see how bringing in another angsty kill'em all kind of writer will somehow uncrap eva. The director will just end up cutting the stuff he doesn't like, or most likely scooping up all the spread out angst, and plopping it on Shinji. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/10(Thu)0655 No.22779 >22758 Nope, they make it blatantly clear that he's just a normal person who said sacrificed everything for the sake of a loves one. Not very different from what Kaworu and Shinji are. Also, was more a sappy romantic tragedy based on Plato's Symposium and Tanabata than NTR >> Name Anonymous 14/04/10(Thu)1654 No.22784 "You Can(Not)Redo" is the same Gendotastic shite as Anno's other Eva....well Redo's. "he's just a normal person who said sacrificed everything for the sake of a loved one" is an indulgent, WAFF explanation (even more than EoE's Gendo). Which really isn't good enough, when you remember Rebendo's "grow up" and "just as planned" passionate one liners, and that he's the foe of Gendoragi's ridiculous P.E.N.I.S Organ..ization. All this I could have overlooked had it not been for the most blatantly clear message(It's the entire movie really) that Anno tries to hammer in to 3.0 is that Shinji has to take responsiblity for his actions, even the retarded ham-fisted way the (yaoi marty-stu Kaworu dies, not as tragedy( say like the anime), but as a result of Shinji's actions. It's very hypocrytical, it's because of Anno's Gendo/Shinji Double Standard, it's the keystone he uses when he does Evangelion. I even came up with a scientific name for the D.S 'Gendoticular Annoletio'. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/11(Fri)0045 No.22785 "Gendoticular Annollatio" >> Name Anonymous 14/04/11(Fri)0126 No.22786 >>22779 Nah. While he used to be (and to a degree still is) a sort of shady antiheroic figure who carries his own suffering and does what he thinks is the only future for humanity, he was always a bit... off. "I'm used to being disliked." *penetrant grin* >> Name Anonymous 14/04/11(Fri)0246 No.22787 The only thing consistant with gendo is him being a stoict easy to animate/poorly written emo-dick. Gendoticular Annollatio is usually overlooked as an explanation for eva, fans tend to look for the 'DEEP' convuluted, pshycobabble bullcrap angle. People who are unaware they're under the influence of NTR's noxious fumes tend to do that. >> Name Anonymous 14/04/11(Fri)0301 No.22788 >>Also, was more a sappy romantic tragedy based on Plato's Symposium and Tanabata. Comparing Eva to the tragedies of old, is like comparing someone with a PhD in Ghost Hunting to a Cancer research scientist. They're both "Doctors" but they don't deserve the same respect.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Thu Apr 10, 2014 3:47 pm That's pretty jumbled mess. But one think I understood from this and can agree with is that Anno is not unfailable guru when it comes to anime.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Thu Apr 10, 2014 7:04 pm TL/DR: Anno is the George Lucas of anime. Though personally I believe he has more talent than Lucas has

[]:             Quote Post by Ispellnogood » Thu Apr 10, 2014 8:36 pm There's definitely truth to this, some at the very least.

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Thu Apr 10, 2014 9:38 pm I'll agree with the notion that Anno's not perfect (huge surprise there, nobody is). Everything else in that clusterfuck of a post is pretty silly, IMHO.

[]:             Quote Post by Ispellnogood » Fri Apr 11, 2014 12:11 am I think the questions I wanted discussed from reading this post are. Does Anno have a Gendo>Shinji Double standard? Is Gendo's shady agenda consistant in eva? Does Evangelion have a Netorare flavour? If yes, then is it why eva fans think it's realistic, deep and (like a guy who gets NTR'ed by his girlfriend) can't let it go? Do you think the 14year time skip represents the amount of time we have been waiting for a redo, instead of changing, growing up and living our lives? I probably should've just asked the questions instead copying an half a post. Forgive me, it's only my second topic post here ever.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Apr 11, 2014 1:47 am Oh wow, I actually read the whole thing. Can't say I've ever seen a perspective like that before. I don't agree with it, but it was interesting. I don't understand how there is a double standard. It's not like Gendo's karma didn't catch up with him.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Apr 11, 2014 3:00 am Ispellnogood wrote: Does Anno have a Gendo>Shinji Double standard? Is Gendo's shady agenda consistant in eva? Does Evangelion have a Netorare flavour? If yes, then is it why eva fans think it's realistic, deep and (like a guy who gets NTR'ed by his girlfriend) can't let it go? Do you think the 14year time skip represents the amount of time we have been waiting for a redo, instead of changing, growing up and living our lives?

[]:             Quote Post by Ispellnogood » Fri Apr 11, 2014 6:31 am I think anime gendo's always been pro-instumentality, what with his original sin talk, and that he was the one who came up with the project in first place. He's the dark visionary who knows that instrumentality is the world that everybody (not just Shinji or him) wishes for, so he gives it to them. EoE Gendos conference with Seele seems very OoC to me, he basiclly saying humans don't need instrumentality, and during the attack when their defeat is clear, he leaves everything to fuyutsuki so he can start instrumentality, it's like he's saying "well... I tried to save the world, but Seele's won so i'm forced to do this". It makes the line " I've waited so long for day" at odds with his actions. Gendo's punishment for closing off his heart, was stoic, dignified and unsatisifying. He's never really paid the 'pound of flesh' that he owes, not like Shinji has at least. Considering these things I can't help but see the "Gendoticular Annolletio" Double standard. I can see the NTR vibe in EoE, with Shinji's masturbation and in the live-action sequence, where Asuka's sleeping with Toji. Gobhobblin wrote that EoE was a "Hit and Run on his soul", I think that's what netorare's appeal is, and when you're invested in characters like evas and get NTR'ed, it gets laser imprinted in your mind and it stays there for many years. NTR can make things more realistic, it's as Agent Smith said "Human Beings define their reality through misery and sufforing". EoE Shinji representing Eva Otaku was the first and most obvious thing I understood in EoE. I think that the 14 year timeskip a bit of trolling from anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Apr 11, 2014 6:46 am Ispellnogood wrote: I think anime gendo's always been pro-instumentality, what with his original sin talk, and that he was the one who came up with the project in first place. He's the dark visionary who knows that instrumentality is the world that everybody (not just Shinji or him) wishes for, so he gives it to them. EoE Gendos conference with Seele seems very OoC to me, he basiclly saying humans don't need instrumentality, and during the attack when their defeat is clear, he leaves everything to fuyutsuki so he can start instrumentality, it's like he's saying "well... I tried to save the world, but Seele's won so i'm forced to do this". It makes the line " I've waited so long for day" at odds with his actions.

[]:             Quote Post by Ispellnogood » Fri Apr 11, 2014 9:29 am I think Seele's Instumentality is Death and Rebirth, Humanity being rebirthed into the White Moon with the tree of life( whatever that means). Gendo's one is Death and Goop, joining of all souls into one, because he's "familiar with hatred" and he has to excist in this hell, only Yui is able to warm his heart and when she goes, the darkness in him comes running back which is why recommends the instrumentality project, which you have to admit comes off a little bit ham-tragedy emo-indulgence. Eoe/Rebuild Gendo is almost treated in a flowery pansy way, when compared to the NTR knuckle dusting Shinji receives in EoE and 3.0. For an Eva fan familiar with Eoe/anime, Q is paticularly hard not WTF at, considering that the whole movie is about Shinji taking responsibility for his actions, with fuyutsuki giving Gendo a "sold his very soul" speech. There's definitely Gendoticular Annollatio going on in eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Ispellnogood » Fri Apr 11, 2014 6:31 am I think anime gendo's always been pro-instumentality, what with his original sin talk, and that he was the one who came up with the project in first place. EoE Gendos conference with Seele seems very OoC to me, he basiclly saying humans don't need instrumentality, and during the attack when their defeat is clear, he leaves everything to fuyutsuki so he can start instrumentality, it's like he's saying "well... I tried to save the world, but Seele's won so i'm forced to do this". It makes the line " I've waited so long for day" at odds with his actions.
